title: Magical Crepes with French Cookie Crumble
description: Thin magical crepes filled with a sweet French cookie crumble, perfect for a sweet treat.

ingredients.name: French Cookie Crumble
ingredients.notes: Make your own with ground French cookies and sugar

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together the crepes flour, sugar, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, egg, and milk.
3. Add the French vanilla extract to the wet ingredients and whisk to combine.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until smooth.
5. Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
6. Pour a small amount of the batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
7. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the edges start to curl.
8. Loosen the crepe with a spatula and flip.
9. Cook for another minute, until the other side is lightly browned.
10. Repeat with the remaining batter, until all the crepes are cooked.
11. To make the French cookie crumble, ground the French cookies in a food processor until finely ground.
12. Mix the ground cookies with sugar and melted butter until well combined.
13. Spoon a small amount of the French cookie crumble onto each crepe.
14. Roll up the crepes and serve immediately.
